text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 234 

RX_FIL_DT 

LABEL: RX File Date — Represents the Year and Month of the Reporting Period 

DESCRIPTION: This field represents the year and month of the reporting period. 

SHORT NAME: RX_FIL_DT 

LONG NAME: RX_FIL_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): RX header 

VALUES: YYYYMM (e.g., 201507 is the date for the July 2015 file) 

COMMENT:
